_comment: Copy this file to observe_config.json to reconfigure OBSERVE for a different machine, user, or software implementation, WITHOUT editing any code. All keys are optional -- omit a key to use the built-in default. Delete observe_config.json entirely to fall back to fully auto-derived defaults (container prefixes derived from the current user's home directory).
_comment_container_prefixes: Path prefixes (drive-stripped, forward-slash form) to strip before taking the next folder as the project name. Order matters: most-specific first, broad catch-alls last. If omitted, these are auto-derived from Path.home() -- e.g. Users/<you>/OneDrive/Documents/, Users/<you>/Documents/, Users/<you>/. Only set this if your codebases live somewhere the auto-derivation doesn't cover (e.g. a dedicated D:/code/ root).
_comment_non_project_hints: Folder names (lowercase) that are NOT codebases -- indexed but reported separately instead of treated as projects. Default is one machine's installed non-code software (DAWs, games). Replace with your own, or set to [] to disable the distinction entirely.
_comment_min_chunks_per_project: Groups smaller than this many indexed chunks are ignored as noise rather than treated as a project. Default 8.
